\"To the person reading this,\\n This no: "To the person reading this,\n This notebook was meant for you.

... I think I shall call these Pokémon... \c[1]Dimensional Rift Pokémon.

... However, when provoked, the Pokémon: ... However, when provoked, the Pokémon can morph into their true body. Born from hatred of course.
This is when a being like no other appea: This is when a being like no other appears. It is very, very, difficult to revert them back at this state.
It is then when they are most vulnerable: It is then when they are most vulnerable. Their body is the literal manifestation of their heart and soul.
It is in this form that we are able to p: It is in this form that we are able to purify them back into their original being.
The process isn't too complicated either: The process isn't too complicated either. You may not understand it, but someone will.
Take this book and follow these directio: Take this book and follow these directions:"
